author: WuBlockchain
title: Binance will list Centrifuge (CFG) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 16, 2026, opening spot trading pairs CFG/USDT, CFG/USDC, and CFG/TRY. Centrifuge provides infrastructure for institutional tokenization with automated systems, multi-chain support, and deep DeFi integrations. CFG will be listed with a Seed Tag.

author: WuBlockchain
title: Japanese micro-strategy company Metaplanet has raised approximately $255 million through a third-party private placement to global institutional investors to advance its goal of acquiring 210,000 BTC, bringing its total funding to a maximum of approximately $531 million.
text: Japanese micro-strategy company Metaplanet has raised approximately $255 million through a third-party private placement to global institutional investors to advance its goal of acquiring 210,000 BTC, bringing its total funding to a maximum of approximately $531 million.

author: WuBlockchain
title: R to @WuBlockchain: Source: https://x.com/gerovich/status/2033470185550811464?s=20
text:
Source: nitter.net/gerovich/status/203347…

Simon Gerovich (@gerovich)

Metaplanet has raised ~$255m from global institutional investors via a placement of new shares priced at a 2% premium, paired with fixed-strike warrants at a 10% premium that monetize our equity volatility for up to ~$276m in additional capital upon exercise. Up to ~$531m in additional firepower on our march towards 210,000 BTC. $MPJPY

— https://nitter.net/gerovich/status/2033470185550811464#m

title: Morgan Stanely: "the past couple of weeks feel like another reminder of how modern markets tend to absorb shocks... Capital hasn’t fled risk so much as shifted around it... Investors have become more comfortable operating in uncertainty rather than waiting for it to clear.”

X Freeze (@XFreeze)

xAI's Grok Imagine just took over the entire DesignArena Video leaderboard - not one, but THREE #1 rankings

→ #1 Video Arena - Elo 1337, a 33-point gap over #2
→ #1 Image to Video Arena - Elo 1298, beating Google Veo 3.1, Kling & Sora

It’s wild, xAI was nowhere in the video space a few months ago, and now it's #1 across various benchmarks
